feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Rf scanning QR codes in warehouse processes
entry.content: Is het possible in public cloud to scan QR codes into the RF menu? And how can we arrange that?

entry.title: How to set different watermarks for D/T/P system?
entry.content:
Hi SAP，

I used the master template. The print template is modified from D and transferred to P. I only open the form template using ALD and see the watermark field. If I adjust the watermark value in ALD, this will also be transferred to the P system. But I don't want to be the same as the watermark in D system. How do I set this?

my system is S4HANA Cloud public edition.

Thanks,

Lingling

entry.title: Is RFC connection used in SAP Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is RFC still used in SAP Public Cloud ? When i’m trying to access AFO using SAP public Cloud i received below screenshot error. And after adding Business Catalog: SAP_BW_BC_AOF_PC the issue was resolved 

But wanted to understand the reason behind the error message ?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.title: How to Customize Order Forms (CSV Output) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello.

 

I am currently looking to customize a purchase order to fit a given EDI site and output to CSV.

What is the best way to achieve a highly flexible customization?

entry.title: Change Package Transport layer - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any option to change the transport layer for packages already created in Public Cloud?

The field is disabled:

I know that I could create a new package with the transport layer properly indicated at creation and move all objects, but there are a lot of them, so it should be the very last option (unless there is an option to massive change all objects from old package to the new one, in ADT I didn't see that option, only 1 by 1).

The main reason is obvious: we cannot transport requests with out transport layer. I know it is also possible to update the Target system directly in the requests, but not sure if it could generate some inconsistencies. And furthermore, it should be done every time we create a new transport with objects inside the package without transport layer.

Updating TDEVC table is neither allowed on Public Cloud. 

For onpremise systems it can be done in SE80 without problems.

 

Thanks a lot,

Kr,

Agustín.

entry.title: Performance optimization of long running queries( CDS Views) in AFO Connecting from SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

could you please let me know how can we optimize long running queries ( CDS Consumption Views) when consuming in AFO for reporting through SAP Public Cloud?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.title: Country field not appearing on the Address in output Forms for sales documents
entry.content:
The Country field is not appearing for the address of the standard output forms, such as Sales Order Confirmation, Delivery Note, and Invoice. 

It needs to be printed by standard on all our customer facing forms. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Annual Sales List - Belgium
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have a question about the Annual Sales List for Belgium. 

On the SAP Help Page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/fba518519f834ed99011786d831ee504/f5bdf2577840bd12e10000000a4450e5.html I am a bit confused about the content of the Annual Sales List.

Normally, the Annual Sales List only includes Business Partners with a Belgian Tax Number and only if the Sales Amount without Tax is more than €250. Although, if the total sales amount is negative because there are more CN's than invoices, that Business Partner is still included in the report. Is this correct?

In my opinion, if there are more CN's than invoices the Sales Amount is negative so less than €250. Does this make sense? 

Thank you for sharing your thoughts.

Kind regards,

Vanessa Callens

entry.title: Advanced Currency Valuation and Define Rules for Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

 

During the Advanced currency valuation the Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes is not as we desire.  In configuration activity Define Rules for Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes we cannot change the inheritance option, it is greyed out for us. Would you please instruct us how to proceed?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - GR Based IV indicator Check
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where the intercompany stock transfer happens from US to UK or France and they don't need to have invoice for that.

Is it possible to create a 0 dollar purchase order in SAP S/4 public cloud. I tried by creating a NBIC PO with marking that line item free but it still throwing an error that GR and IR indicators are necessary. GR Based IV indicator is greyed out and I couldn't do any manual control over that. I checked in Vendor master and it's unticked on that and also there is no PIR maintained for that product. I believe it's a system default setting. Would someone can throw some lights on the above would be great.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Availability of Combined Orders/Collective order Functions in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are tasked with providing a solution for the printing and packaging industry, where Advanced Variant Configuration is being implemented. One of the main components in production is the paper reel. To optimize the utilization of paper reels, maximize production capacity, and reduce costs, the company produces multiple customer orders within a single production cycle.
In this process, all the BOM components for the multiple orders are issued collectively, and the finished goods are also received in one consolidated attempt.
To address this requirement, we have identified that combined orders or collective orders may be viable options within the SAP system. However, we seek to understand the feasibility and implementation possibilities of these options in the SAP Public Cloud environment. Additionally, we would like to know if there are any alternative approaches available to achieve this requirement.

Best regards,
Kaushika Nanayakkara

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How do we maintain code list in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have added few code list using "custom field" app for business context "cost center master". Fields are added to "manage cost center "app. My question is how business will maintain these code list in production?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: Error Message Type 'W' gets handled as 'I' in BADI
entry.content:
Hello together,

i am using the BADI SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE and its working almost perfect.

I make a check for the credit limit when removing the deliveryblock. And i want to give out the message as a Warning when the credit limit is exceeded. I tried out the Messagetype 'E' and it displayed me an Error Message like it should and i could not save the salesorder. But in my case i got 'W' in there and i get the Message as Info and it gets saved automatically before asking.

Does anyone know the solution?

Best regards

Filip

entry.title: Linking of activities and milestones in Project System on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I had a few questions regarding Project System in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (specific for construction project):

1) Can we link activities (or child WBS) to milestones in a project with revenue created in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

2) Can we bill the client as per the completed project milestone? I can see that milestones can be created separately in the project and in the sales order, but can these be linked?

3) Can we create a mass project demand? I can create a demand for a single material/service, but I need the functionality to create activity-wise mass demand.

4) Is there any functionality to create and maintain a bill of quantities, say, for a construction project? Said bill of quantities should be available during project planning.

5) In case of a scenario where construction material needs to be transferred from one project site to another, can the material be transferred across the assigned WBS?

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Standard AR AP aging report APP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We only find "AR Aging Analysis" and "Payable Aging" reports for AR and AP aging in S4HANA Cloud Public Edition. But they only can display the amounts by top 10 customers and top 10 suppliers.

Our customer requires to view the amounts by all customers or suppliers in the aging report. Please advise if there are any standard aging reports available for use that meet the requirement? It is also expected that user can use global search in finding those reports easily.

entry.title: Individual number enquiry
entry.content:
Hi experts,

In S4hana Cloud Public, can individual segment configure to show sales order number instead of IN/QT number if the sales order is created from QT/IM? ECC was configured to show sales order number only

entry.title: Personnel numbers not showing in the COOIS report for operation confirmation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I’d like to discuss a specific requirement from our client, regarding generating KPI reports for their employees. So, the requirement is like this. For example, the production processes include a printing operation, and they want to generate a KPI report detailing the number of printing jobs each employee completes annually. 

Currently:
 
  • During operation confirmation using CO11N, we have a field to record the personnel number, and we can select employees from the system.
  • And we can use Production Order Information System (COOIS), to filtering based on personnel numbers.

     

       

    As you can see though we can record the personnel number during operation confirmation, but this data is not being reflected in the report (Refer the above screen shot). So, is there any way we can capture the personnel number entered during operation confirmation and link it to the standard reports?

    Thank you very much!

    Best regards,
    Kaushika Nanayakkara

    SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing

entry.title: CDS for Customer hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I was looking for any cds available for customer hierarchy, I found few in view browser, but they are not released, so we cant use them.

We have a requirement to fetch customer hierarchy details maintained in "manage customer hierarchy". Any idea, how can i get the cds for this?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Correspondence: Open Item List in Public Cloud PDF Preview in Monitor Email Transmission
entry.content:
Dear All,

when creating in App Schedule Accounts Receivable Jobs a run Correspondence: Open Item List while the output is maintained as E-Mail I can´t see an PDF preview of the open item list in App Monitor Email Transmission.

Any idea how to get for the run an PDF preview. It is working for an single output in App Create Correspondence however this is not what i am asking for.

Many thanks

Sebastian

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Error: Asset Value Date Cannot Be Later Than Transfer Date
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on uploading Fixed Asset Postings via the Migration Cockpit in SAP Public Cloud. During the upload, I encountered the following error:

Error Message: Asset value date (01.01.2024) cannot be later than transfer date (31.12.2023)
Message Class: AA
Message Number: 247

What surprises me is that a previous upload with the same date pattern was processed successfully without any issues.

Details of the Scenario:

In both uploads, the Asset Value Date is 01.01.2024 and the Transfer Date is 31.12.2023.
The system accepted the earlier upload but rejects this one, even though no configuration changes have been made in the interim.
Could anyone guide me on:

Why this inconsistency might be occurring?
Steps I can take to resolve or bypass this issue?

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help.

Best regards,

Muaaz
